title: phaeanthus piyae
intro: Phaeanthus piyae, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a plant species native to Borneo, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phaeanthus piyae include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Phaeanthus piyae are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water or using it as a decoction, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
